headline: AutoZone (AZO) Faces New Questions As O'Reilly Eyes Genuine Parts Deal
summary: O'Reilly Automotive is rumored to be preparing a takeover bid for Genuine Parts Company. The potential deal would create a larger rival in auto parts retail, raising competitive concerns for AutoZone (NYSE:AZO). Investors are assessing what a combined O'Reilly and Genuine Parts footprint could mean for AutoZone's position in the sector. AutoZone operates as a major retailer of aftermarket automotive parts and accessories, serving both professional mechanics and do it yourself customers. The...
